subject: session date
fact: The session date is Nov 22nd, 2025.
source_quote: Date: Nov 22nd, 2025

subject: level up
fact: The party levels up to 10th level.
source_quote: levels up to 10th level

subject: Daein
fact: Daein increases his Charisma score with his ability score improvement.
source_quote: Daein increases his Charisma score with his ability score improvement

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas is confirmed to have received Bracers of Archery and an Oathbow as equipment.
source_quote: Akritas is confirmed to have received Bracers of Archery and an Oathbow as equipment

subject: Malkyn Grenefeld
fact: The party defeated Malkyn Grenefeld in Hillsfar.
source_quote: defeating Malkyn Grenefeld in Hillsfar

subject: Graz'zt
fact: The demon lord Graz'zt threatened vengeance for his thwarted plot.
source_quote: the demon lord Graz'zt's carefully constructed plot

subject: Red Plume
fact: The Red Plume guards found themselves caught between fractured factions.
source_quote: Red Plume guards found themselves caught between fractured factions

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is the head of the Thieves Guild.
source_quote: Isthana, the head of the Thieves Guild

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana appeared in the blood-soaked temple where the final battle had taken place.
source_quote: appeared in the blood-soaked temple where the final battle had taken place

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana thanked the party for creating extraordinary opportunities for her organization.
source_quote: thanking the party for creating such extraordinary opportunities for her organization

subject: political offer
fact: Isthana offered the party positions in Hillsfar's new political order.
source_quote: offered them positions in Hillsfar's new political order

subject: Daein
fact: Daein declined the offer to join Hillsfar's political order immediately.
source_quote: Daein declined immediately

subject: Daein
fact: Daein stated he preferred to keep his head attached to his body.
source_quote: stating he preferred to keep his head attached to his body

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas received enchanted bracers from the castle's stores.
source_quote: Akritas receiving enchanted bracers

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas received superior leather armor from the castle's stores.
source_quote: and superior leather armor

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim was outfitted with magical plate mail.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Daein were outfitted with magical plate mail

subject: Daein
fact: Daein was outfitted with magical plate mail.
source_quote: and Daein were outfitted with magical plate mail

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas received Studded Leather +1 armor.
source_quote: Akritas receives Studded Leather +1 armor

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas received Bracers of Archery.
source_quote: and Bracers of Archery

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim received Mithral Plate armor.
source_quote: Bramgrim receives Mithral Plate armor

subject: Daein
fact: Daein received Plate Mail +1.
source_quote: Daein receives Plate Mail +1

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas revealed she can cast Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: Akritas reveals she can cast Pass Without Trace

subject: stealth bonus
fact: Pass Without Trace grants the entire party a plus 10 to stealth.
source_quote: granting the entire party a plus 10 to stealth

subject: Hillsfar Castle
fact: The party prepared to leave through the castle's main gate.
source_quote: prepared to leave through the castle's main gate

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana left through the sewers.
source_quote: Isthana leaves through the sewers

subject: gate passage
fact: Red Plume guards at the front door let the blood-spattered party pass without confrontation.
source_quote: ultimately let the blood-spattered party pass without confrontation

subject: owlbear armor commission
fact: The party commissioned custom-made scale mail armor for their owlbear companion.
source_quote: commission custom-made scale mail armor for their owlbear companion

subject: owlbear scale mail
fact: The party ordered scale mail for the owlbear at a cost of 200 gold pieces.
source_quote: order scale mail for the owlbear at a cost of 200 gold pieces

subject: Tavern in Hillsfar
fact: The party settled into a tavern to rest and recover.
source_quote: settled into a tavern to rest and recover

subject: Charles
fact: Charles arrived with urgent news from the Emerald Enclave.
source_quote: Charles arrived with urgent news from the Emerald Enclave

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: The Emerald Enclave wishes to speak with the party about a new danger involving fire giants infused with Graz'zt's power.
source_quote: Emerald Enclave wishes to speak with the party about a new danger involving fire giants infused with Graz'zt's power

subject: Drow
fact: The Drow brought terrifying intelligence about Graz'zt's continued machinations.
source_quote: the Drow had brought terrifying intelligence about Graz'zt's continued machinations

subject: fire giants
fact: Graz'zt had infused fire giants with his own blood.
source_quote: infused fire giants with his own blood

subject: mission briefing
fact: Charles directed the party to meet representatives at the Silver Shadow Cave near Elventree.
source_quote: directed the party to meet representatives at the Silver Shadow Cave near Elventree

subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: The party traveled to the sacred cave of Selûne.
source_quote: traveled to the sacred cave of Selûne

subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: The party arrived in the evening as soft moonlight bathed the clearing in pale radiance.
source_quote: arriving in the evening as soft moonlight bathed the clearing in pale radiance

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a Drow with silver hair, emerald green eyes, and skin so dark it appeared nearly purple.
source_quote: Murssvayas Dhuurniv, a Drow with silver hair, emerald green eyes, and skin so dark it appeared nearly purple

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv greeted each party member individually, including the owlbear.
source_quote: greeted each party member individually, including the owlbear

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: The owlbear seemed to recognize Murssvayas Dhuurniv with unusual familiarity.
source_quote: who seemed to recognize him with unusual familiarity

subject: Szith Morcane
fact: The Drow outpost of Szith Morcane had been sacked by an army of slaves led by fiendish fire giants and demons.
source_quote: Drow outpost of Szith Morcane had been sacked by an army of slaves led by fiendish fire giants and demons

subject: Maerimydra
fact: The army that sacked Szith Morcane came from the city of Maerimydra.
source_quote: from the city of Maerimydra

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is the leader of the outpost of Szith Morcane.
source_quote: outpost's leader, Solom Ned'razak

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is an incredibly powerful wizard.
source_quote: an incredibly powerful wizard

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak fled to the fungal forest known as the Sporedome.
source_quote: fled to the fungal forest known as the Sporedome

subject: Sporedome
fact: The Sporedome is a fungal forest in the Underdark where other survivors had gathered.
source_quote: fungal forest known as the Sporedome, where other survivors had gathered

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is the chief alchemist of the Drow.
source_quote: chief alchemist, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this had been captured during the raid on Szith Morcane.
source_quote: had been captured during the raid

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was working on a ritual to purge the fiendish blood from the giants.
source_quote: working on a ritual to purge the fiendish blood from the giants

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a creature who operates an extraplanar brokerage.
source_quote: creature named Maram il Vass, who operated an extraplanar brokerage

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The Den of the Whispered Word is an extraplanar brokerage located in the Howling Pits.
source_quote: extraplanar brokerage called the Den of the Whispered Word in the twisted realm known as the Howling Pits

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this had been sold to Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Xaven had been sold to a creature named Maram il Vass

subject: Solom's pendant
fact: Murssvayas produced a pendant that Bramgrim recognized as belonging to Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: produced a pendant that Bramgrim recognized as belonging to Solom Ned'razak

subject: mission agreement
fact: The party agreed to undertake the mission to rescue Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: party ultimately agreed to undertake the perilous mission

subject: reward promise
fact: Solom Ned'razak promised to grant the party an item from the legendary Drow horde if they successfully rescued Xaven and reclaimed Szith Morcane.
source_quote: promised that if the party successfully rescued Xaven and helped reclaim Szith Morcane, they would be granted an item from the legendary Drow horde

subject: fire giant conquest
fact: The fire giants are threatening to complete their conquest of the Underdark.
source_quote: before the fire giants could complete their conquest of the Underdark

subject: surface world defense
fact: The fire giants may turn their attention to the defenseless cities of the surface world.
source_quote: turn their attention to the defenseless cities of the surface world
